discaRd 2.3.0

Package index

All functions

add_nobs()
add_nobs add number of observed subtrips according to the `DISCARD_SOURCE` used `n` is number of obsereved subtrips used. This may cross fishing years in the case of Assumed (A) or transition rates (T). Gear only rates use two years of information so `n` for those is across two years (_t and _t-1)
assign_discard_source()
Assign Discard Source this is an internal function that assigns DISCARD_SOURCE. IT is explcitly designed to account for situations where there is an observed trip with no observed hauls.
assign_strata()
Assign Strata uses text input to coalesce variables to a STRATA column
calc_cochran_rate()
Estimates Cochran discard rate and required sample sizes
calc_cochran_rate_strata()
Estimate discard rates (and other attributes) by strata
discard_generic()
discard_generic: Calculate discards for January fishing year species
discard_generic_diagnostic()
discard_generic_diagnostic: Calculate discards for January fishing year Support tables in this version are function variables. This allows them to be modified and run for diagnostic testing. This function can output a summary of discard information by strata, including number of trips used, variance, CV, discard amount, and KALL. It can also output a table, by subtrip, with all information. This table can be summarized afterward as well. If testing several scenarios, it is recommended to only output the summary rather than the full subtrip table as each output is 1-2GB.
discard_groundfish()
discard_groundfish: Calculate groundfish discards
discard_groundfish_diagnostic()
discard_groundfish_diagnostic: Calculate groundfish discards: Calculate discards for May groundfish fishing year
eflalo
eflalo dataset from VMSTOOLS
get_broad_stock_rate()
Get Broad Stock Rate This function is a special case of run_discard. When stock is used as a stratification variable, it is not straightforward to get a broad stock rate, with a CV. This function simply subsets a larger dataset by stock component before running run_discard. The advantage of having this as a function is it may easily be run in a loop.
get_catch_obs()
Get Catch OBS data
get_catch_obs_diag()
Get Catch OBS data
get_catch_obs_diag_nefsc()
Get Catch OBS data at NEFSC
get_covrow()
Get covrow Get total number of trips (N) and observed trips (n) in a strata Get the row-based covariance based on Chris Legault's equations/markdown
get_date_range()
Get Date Range get date range for particular type of fishing year
get_obs_disc_vals()
Get Observed Discards
get_trans_rate()
TRANSITION RATE
`%!in%`
notin the most useful function not included in base R!
make_assumed_rate()
Make an assumed rate
make_bdat_focal()
Get Observed trips for discard year This function utilizes the DISCARD field in CAMS_OBS_CATCH. This value must be used for d/k calculations since it represents the observed part of a trip.
make_mrem_table()
Build MREM KALL adjustment table make a table for yourself since ITD won't let you make a View... —- Make MREM adjustment table on the fly This currently lives at GARFO as a View. Thus, it is not ported to NEFSC via TTS. NEFSC IT goons do not allow Oracle View creation so the code can't simply be shared in a normal fashion. This function is the work around. It will generate a MREM KALL adjustment table in the users workspace. This is needed when pulling data for a CAMS discard diagnostic run.
make_strata_desc()
make_strata_desc
parse_discard_diag()
Parse Discard Table for Diagnostics Parses discard results, cleans the table (e.g. infinite).
run_discard()
Run discaRd end to end
scallop_subroutine()
Groundfish discards on scallop trips This function oeprates identically to otehr discard modules but is only relevant for scallop trips, and is predicated on what groundfish fishing year is under evaluation.
scallop_subroutine_diag()
Groundfish discards on scallop trips This function oeprates identically to otehr discard modules but is only relevant for scallop trips, and is predicated on what groundfish fishing year is under evaluation.
setup_parallel()
Setup parallel
summarise_single_discard_row()
Reduce the ddat_focal dataframe for inputting into discards to one row per species-subtrip-link1
unite_by_source()
Unite by source This function gets a `STRATA_USED_DESC` for a data frame. This must be used with a specific `DISCARD_SOURCE` and `GF` grouping.

Developed by Benjamin Galuardi.
